relations.note: Charts/tables use uniform corners instead of the asymmetric accent shape.
Specifies how the accent shape's radius pairs are oriented and kept consistent.

quotes: A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius.
Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).
Used to house callout text and photography. Reads modern and optimistic.
**[GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi):** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px.

rules.intent: Establish the signature accent-shape container that reads modern and optimistic.
rules.rule_text: The Brand Accent Shape is a rectangle with selectively enlarged opposite corner radii (the other two corners keep a slight radius), used to house callout text and photography. Use the approved radius pairs per size role (print: large 1.25" & 0.0625", banner 0.5" & 0.0625", small callout 0.4375" & 0.0625"; email large 120px & 6px, banner 48px & 6px, callout 42px & 6px), maintaining the 5:1 accent radius ratio.

quotes: Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).

rules.intent: Keep accent-shape orientation consistent across an email for a coherent look.
rules.rule_text: Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right) and the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: use the same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).

quotes: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners
**Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

rules.intent: Charts and tables read as neutral data containers rather than branded accent shapes.
rules.rule_text: Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners (chart.radius = 12px uniform), NOT the asymmetric accent shape.
